title: Urgent Opening Hotel Manager at Aman Resorts India Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Hotel Manager at Aman Resorts India Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Aman Resorts India Advisory Limited is actively seeking a talented and motivated Hotel Manager to join our dynamic team in Indore. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Aman Resorts India Advisory Limited:
Aman Resorts India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aman Resorts India Advisory Limited!
